description: Phase 010 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. SCAFFOLD ONLY — execution gated on packets 008 + 009 verdicts plus the deep-research convergence on the 016 umbrella. Fine-tunes a small cross-encoder (ms-marco-base or BGE-base) on (query, spec-doc) triples drawn from spec-memory's corpus. The 2026-05-21 ms-marco bench showed off-the-shelf models reorder spec-memory's structured-markdown docs WORSE than positional fallback; this packet tests whether a domain-targeted fine-tune addresses that. If gates fail, rerank slot is documented as permanently non-load-bearing for this corpus.
